     The Numbers Business Report

About My Father (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,089,391Details
International Box Office $5,567,826
Worldwide Box Office $17,657,217
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $266,771
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $344,363
Total $611,134
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sebastian is encouraged by his fiancée to bring his immigrant, hairdresser father, Salvo, to a weekend get-together with her super-rich and exceedingly eccentric family. The weekend develops into what can only be described as a culture clash, leaving Sebastian and Salvo to discover that the great thing about family is everything about family.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,321,148 (35.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.80 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,464 opening theaters/2,464 max. theaters, 2.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $13,216,553

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 26th, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (West Indies)
May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Chile)
May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Bolivia)
May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Singapore)
May 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Ecuador)
Video Release: June 16th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for suggestive material, language and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2782 (cert #53644), 5/10/2023)
Running Time: 89 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Autobiographical, Screenplay Written By the Star
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Alabama, United States
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Romance
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Depth of Field, Media Capital Technologies
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
